rules.name: Variable is declared but never used
Single line comments should start with "--"
Types should be named in PascalCase
Null pointers should not be dereferenced
Boolean literals should not be redundant
Redundant casts should not be used
Utility classes should not have public constructors
Unused private types or members should be removed
Template should be a static expression
Non-nullable field must contain a non-null value when exiting constructor. Consider adding the 'required' modifier or declaring as nullable.
Dereference of a possibly null reference.
Use concrete types when possible for improved performance
Logging in a catch clause should pass the caught exception as a parameter.
